ci_aware: bootstrap CI lower bound must clear the bar (D-V4-10 hardening), measured with the same eval_relabel.py 2000-resample percentile bootstrap on both paths

single_seed_figure.note: the literal JUDGE-03 / pre-registered-criteria methodology (vLLM-served, 8192-token cap, eval_relabel.py)

single_seed_tinker_capture_reference.note: cheap promotion-path figure (how v1.3's 0.8274 promotion decision was made) -- NOT the gating methodology, recorded to keep the two distinct

ensemble_figure.note: 3-seed median ensemble on the cheap Tinker-capture path; the vLLM-served 3-MERGED ensemble is deferred to packaging (Phase 27)

reopen_condition.verbatim: Re-open the relabel campaign ONLY IF the new base's judge SFT, trained on the reused labels, saturates below the pre-registered rho target (0.85/0.87) above AND diagnostic investigation (mirroring the 2026-07-08 gap-closure investigation pattern -- capacity, loss-shape, data-cleaning levers) rules out training-recipe causes. In that specific case, label quality/coverage becomes the remaining suspect and a fresh or expanded relabel pass is warranted. Do not re-run the campaign speculatively "just in case".
reopen_condition.condition_assessment: (a) saturated-below-target: YES on this measurement (neither 0.85 single nor 0.87 ensemble CI-lower cleared). (b) gap-closure diagnostic ruling out recipe causes: NOT YET RUN on this base -- the 2026-07-08 gap_closure_summary.json diagnostics (capacity/loss-shape/data-cleaning) were measured on Qwen3-30B-A3B, not Qwen3.6-35B-A3B. Both (a) AND (b) are required; (b) is unmet, so the re-open condition is NOT met. No re-open triggered here (recording only, per plan).
